elena.request_summary: Improve the basic error handling of the maze-master logic
elena.why: Current error handling does not gracefully handle exceptions, which impacts user experience.
top_steps: Identify and fix all exception handling in main.py to include try-except blocks.
Add detailed comments explaining the error handling process for future reference.
Run unit tests after changes to ensure no new errors are introduced.
success_criteria: All exceptions in main.py have been properly handled with try-except blocks.
Detailed comments have been added to explain the error handling logic in main.py.
Unit tests pass without any new failures after making the changes.
